summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CA.OS Staff Management application. All backend APIs working perfectly (20/20 tests passed). Frontend login, navigation, and core UI functionality working correctly. Admin login flow successful, dashboard loads with statistics, navigation between pages functional. Create dialogs present for all major features (employees, tasks, leaves, clients, queries). Minor observation: Clock-in/out buttons only available for employee role, not admin/manager roles (which is correct behavior).
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@caos.com/admin123 returns token and user object
Backend: Dashboard stats API returns all required fields (total_employees, active_tasks, present_today, pending_leaves, recent_tasks, weekly_attendance)
Backend: Employee CRUD operations (create, list, get) working correctly
Backend: Task CRUD operations (create, list, update status) working correctly
Backend: Attendance clock-in/clock-out API endpoints functional
Backend: Leave management (apply, approve, list) working correctly
Backend: Client CRUD operations working correctly
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with proper form elements
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard successfully
Frontend: Dashboard renders with statistics cards and recent tasks table
Frontend: Navigation sidebar works - all links functional (Dashboard, Tasks, Employees, Attendance, Leaves, Clients, Queries)
Frontend: Create/Add buttons present on all relevant pages (Add Employee, New Task, Apply Leave, Add Client, New Query)
Frontend: UI design consistent with professional CA office theme
Frontend: No error messages or broken functionality detected
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20), Frontend: 95% (15/16 - clock buttons correctly hidden for admin role)
